title: Phenom
description: Step into the world of Phenom, where performance optimizations meet an enriched gameplay experience. Whether you're a casual player or a hardcore adventurer, Phenom transforms Minecraft into a more immersive and enjoyable experience.
body:
<center>

![Phenom Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13d746a241e8fb82d7631112cb66c1e64e829e38.png)

</center>
Step into the world of Phenom, where performance optimizations meet an enriched gameplay experience. Whether you're a casual player or a hardcore adventurer, Phenom transforms Minecraft into a more immersive and enjoyable experience.

---

You begin on your very own continent, ripe for exploring new terrains and biomes. Discover intriguing new structures, every corner of your Minecraft world brims with opportunities. Smarter mobs, passive endermen, and an overhauled End called Nullscape are just a few of the unique features awaiting you. Spyglass astronomy urges you to gaze at the stars, while unwrecked ships are ready to be plundered. Adventure awaits!

---

### Features:
- 🌍 New Terrain and Biomes - Terralith and Tectonic bring diverse landscapes
- 🏛️ New Structures - Uncover new buildings and ruins that add depth and mystery to the world.
- ⚔️ RPG Difficulty - The mobs are smarter... and the deeper you traverse the tougher they fight!
- 🔧 Quality of Life Features - Enjoy enhancements that make gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.
- 🧑‍🌾 Passive Endermen - Interact with these normally hostile creatures in a whole new way.
- 🚢 Unwrecked Ships - Explore intact ships full of treasures and secrets.
- 🔭 Spyglass Astronomy - Use the spyglass to observe the stars and create your own constellations.
- 🐝 Realistic Bees - Experience a more lifelike interaction with bees and their environment. 
- 🌌 Nullscape - Venture into an overhauled End dimension that's more challenging and rewarding than ever.
- 💩 Manure - Utilize manure to enhance your farming and gardening experience.
- 🔥 Healing Campfires - Heal yourself and keep mobs away by resting near campfires.
- 🌋 Hearths: Improvements to the Nether Wastes, the Crimson Forest, and the Warped Forest.
- ⚙️ Performance Optimizations - Smoother gameplay with performance enhancements & Shader support
- 😶‍🌫️ And so much more... 
  
---

Phenom is packed with a plethora of mods designed to elevate your Minecraft experience. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, Phenom offers something for every type of player. Immerse yourself in an all-new Minecraft adventure!

---
### Shaders & Resource Packs:

 - [Patrix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x)
